backstory.original: Nova V'ger has a voracious appetite for knowledge; she needs to know anything and everything about anything and everything. Her magic powers have been gifted to her by a mysterious entity called Tiangong. She dreams of travelling to the stars and discovering the location of the true genasi homeworld.
backstory.display: 诺娃·威格对知识有种贪婪的渴望，她想要了解关于任何事情的一切。她的魔力是由名为“天工”的神秘实体赐予。她的梦想是前往星空，找到真正的元素裔家园。

description.original: Nova leaps out and slices through the nearest enemy with Tiangong.
description.display: 诺娃跳起用天工割裂距离最近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Nova leaps out and slices through the nearest enemy with Tiangong. If her attack kills the enemy, it drops a monster heart.
longDescription.display: 诺娃跳起用天工割裂距离最近的敌人。如果攻击将敌人击杀，会掉落一颗怪物心脏。

description.original: Nova levitates with Tiangong, releasing three waves of blue energy damaging all enemies.
description.display: 诺娃与天工一起漂浮，释放三波蓝色能量波，伤害所有敌人。

longDescription.original: Nova levitates up in the air as Tiangong floats in front of the formation, releasing three waves of blue energy that deal damage to all enemies. The damage is increased by 1% times to total number of Aerois Synergy stacks.
longDescription.display: 诺娃漂浮于空中，将天工悬浮于阵型之前，释放三道蓝色能量波对所有敌人造成伤害。此伤害提高 1% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同的堆叠总层数。

description.desc: Nova is intrinsically curious about the creatures inhabiting the world. She inspects enemies as soon as they spawn, increasing their damage taken by $amount%. This increases by 10% (additively) every second they are alive, to a cap of 1000% (90 seconds). This ability is increased by 200% if Nova is in the front-most column of the formation.
诺娃天生对居住在这个世界中的生物充满好奇。她会在敌人出现后立即进行检查，使其受到的伤害提高 $amount%。敌人每存活一秒，此数字就会提高 10%（以加算方式堆叠），上限为 1000%（90 秒）。如果诺娃处于阵型的最前列，则此技能提高 200%。

tipText.original: Nova is intrinsically curious about the world around her. She increases the damage done to creatures the longer they are alive.
tipText.display: 诺娃天生对周围的世界充满好奇。根据生物存活的时间，时间越长，她对其造成的伤害越大。

description.desc: Nova increases the damage of Champions within two slots by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion level on the affected Champions, stacking multiplicatively. Each Champion's contribution caps at $(max_level_contribution_after_last_upgrade) levels after their last available upgrade.
诺娃提高距离她 2 格内勇士的伤害，受影响勇士的每个勇士等级均可提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每位勇士的贡献上限是其最后一次可用进阶后的 $(max_level_contribution_after_last_upgrade) 级。

tipText.original: Nova increases the damage of all nearby Champions based on the sum of their levels.
tipText.display: 诺娃根据相邻勇士的等级总和提高所有相邻勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Nova increases the max health of all other Champions by 25% of her base max health.
诺娃提升其他所有勇士的最大生命值，数值相当于她基础最大生命值的 25%。

Nova contributes one stack to Aerois Synergy every time an enemy is stunned, rooted, or slowed. Their maximum number of stacks is 200 plus the highest area completed in the current run divided by 5 (rounded down). 10% of her contributed stacks are removed when changing areas. The Crew is increased by 20% times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks.
每当一名敌人被眩晕、定身或减速时，诺娃都为埃罗伊斯协同贡献一层堆叠。其最大堆叠层数为 200 加上当前关卡中完成的最高区域除以 5（向下舍入）。改变区域时，移除她所贡献堆叠的 10%。“小队”提高 20% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同的堆叠总层数。

Nova's attacks slow the movement of enemies she damages by 50% for 5 seconds. Enemies that are Slowed by this ability deal half damage to Nova. This effect does not stack if it is applied again before it expires, but the cooldown is refreshed.
诺娃的攻击使受到她伤害的敌人减速 50%，持续 5 秒。被此技能减速的敌人对诺娃造成的伤害减半。如果在此效果消失之前再次应用，则此效果不会堆叠，但会刷新冷却时间。

When Nova becomes Overwhelmed, Tiangong creates a protective barrier around her and all other Champions in her column, granting them each 250% of Nova's max health as temporary HP. The effect of The Crew is increased by 400% for each Champion's shield that remains in place (stacking multiplicatively). Nova is stunned until the shield is broken or she is no longer overwhelmed. This can only trigger once per area. Changing areas resets it so it can happen again, but also resets the damage bonus and un-stuns Nova.
当诺娃被击溃时，天工在她和所有与她同列的勇士周围制造一道保护屏障，使其获得诺娃最大生命值的 250% 作为临时生命值。每个存在的勇士护盾均使“小队”技能的效果提高 400%（以乘算方式堆叠）。诺娃被眩晕，直到护盾被打破或者她不再被“击溃”。每个区域只能触发一次。改变区域会重置此技能，从而可以再次触发，但也会重置伤害加成和解除诺娃的眩晕。
The Crew now applies to all Champions within 3 slots, but the extra Champions are only counted towards its levels total at 50% effectiveness.
“小队”现在应用于距离 3 格内的所有勇士，但额外的勇士仅以 50% 的有效性计入其总等级。

specializationDescription.original: Nova focuses on expanding her crew
specializationDescription.display: 诺娃专注于扩大她的小队

description.desc: Increases the effect of The Crew by 100%

specializationDescription.original: Nova focuses on her closest crewmates
specializationDescription.display: 诺娃专注于她最亲密的队友

conditions.desc: Nova increases the damage of the $number_of_targets Champions in the formation with the highest Intelligence score by $amount%. This effect is buffed by $monster_heart_buff% for each monster heart she has collected (stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively), and $monster_brain_buff% for each monster brain she has collected (stacking multiplicatively and then applying multiplicatively).^Heroes of Aerois are automatically buffed by Discovery and are not included in the calculations for highest INT score.

Nova increases the damage of the $number_of_targets Champions in the formation with the highest Intelligence score by $amount%. This effect is buffed by $monster_heart_buff% for each monster heart she has collected (stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively), and $monster_brain_buff% for each monster brain she has collected (stacking multiplicatively and then applying multiplicatively).

诺娃为阵型中智力点数最高的 $number_of_targets 位勇士提升 $amount% 伤害。她每收集到一颗怪物心脏，此效果即加强 $monster_heart_buff%（以加算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效），她每收集到一个怪物大脑，此效果即加强 $monster_brain_buff%（以乘算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效）。^埃罗伊斯的英雄们会自动被发现技能强化，无需接受最高智力点数检定。
诺娃为阵型中智力点数最高的 $number_of_targets 位勇士提升 $amount% 伤害。她每收集到一颗怪物心脏，此效果即加强 $monster_heart_buff%（以加算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效），她每收集到一个怪物大脑，此效果即加强 $monster_brain_buff%（以乘算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效）。

description.original: The needs of the many, you know how it goes.
description.display: 很多人的需求，你知道是怎么回事。

description.original: ME?? I mean...uh...We can do this! Yay! Go us!
description.display: 我？？我是说......呃......我们可以做到的！耶！我们加油！

description.original: I'd recalculate your odds, but that's just me.
description.display: 我会重新计算你的概率，但那也只是我。

description.original: What? My Ma always taught me to dress in layers!
description.display: 什么？我妈妈经常叫我多穿衣服！

description.original: With a name like Brookstone, I'm sure we can trust him!
description.display: 就冲着溪石这个名字，我敢肯定我们可以相信他！

description.original: So what planet are we on again?
description.display: 那么我们又到了什么位面？

description.original: I'm happy to wait here till my theory is confirmed.
description.display: 我很高兴在这里等着我的理论被证实。

description.original: Perhaps we can talk this out? No?
description.display: 也许我们可以谈谈？不是吗？

description.original: You've handled worse, Nova. You've definitely handled worse.
description.display: 诺娃，你已经做得很差劲了，你绝对做得很差劲。

description.original: Have you ever seen so many beautiful worlds?
description.display: 你见过这么多美丽的世界吗？

description.original: If we all work together, what could go wrong?
description.display: 如果我们同心协力，还会有什么问题呢？

description.original: Oh, you want me to lead? Well...Let's go team!
description.display: 哦，你想让我当首领？好吧......我们走，队员们！

description.original: Now that it's confirmed, let's put my theory to the test.
description.display: 既然已经确认了，那就来检验一下我的理论吧。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Nova V'ger has a voracious appetite for knowledge; she needs to know anything and everything about anything and everything. Her magic powers have been gifted to her by a mysterious entity called Tiangong. She dreams of travelling to the stars and discovering the location of the true genasi homeworld.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nova is a tanking and support Champion who buffs her crew based on their experience together.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 诺娃·威格对知识有种贪婪的渴望，她想要了解关于任何事情的一切。她的魔力是由名为“天工”的神秘实体赐予。她的梦想是前往星空，找到真正的元素裔家园。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 诺娃是一名坦克和支援勇士，她根据队员们已获得的经验值为他们提供增益。
